mapper.select: SELECT cr.collect_id AS "collectId", cr.target_type AS "targetType", cr.target_id AS "targetId", cr.create_time AS "createTime", COALESCE( a.title, a5.title, SUBSTRING(p_sub.content, 1, 40), c.title, w.title, '' ) AS "title", COALESCE( a.cover_image, a5.cover_image, SUBSTRING_INDEX(p_sub.images, ',', 1), c.cover_image, SUBSTRING_INDEX(w.images, ',', 1), '' ) AS "coverImage" FROM ( SELECT collect_id, IFNULL(target_type, 1) AS target_type, IFNULL(target_id, article_id) AS target_id, create_time FROM collect_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND (target_id IS NOT NULL OR article_id IS NOT NULL) ) cr LEFT JOIN article a ON cr.target_type = 1 AND cr.target_id = a.article_id LEFT JOIN article a5 ON cr.target_type = 5 AND cr.target_id = a5.article_id AND a5.category_id = 1 LEFT JOIN post p_sub ON cr.target_type = 2 AND cr.target_id = p_sub.post_id LEFT JOIN course c ON cr.target_type = 3 AND cr.target_id = c.course_id LEFT JOIN user_work w ON cr.target_type = 4 AND cr.target_id = w.work_id ORDER BY cr.create_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}
